response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive software development experience, including work with high-performance systems, real-time data processing, and embedded systems. However, his background is heavily skewed toward web and general software engineering rather than specialized hardware optimization, SoC/IP modeling, or AI accelerator workloads. His education and work history do not align closely with the Principal Performance Architect role's technical requirements, though his problem-solving skills and adaptability are notable.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with experience in high-performance systems and real-time data processing
Proven ability to develop and maintain complex systems, including embedded and hardware-adjacent software
Demonstrated expertise in multiple programming languages and paradigms, showing versatility and depth
concerns: Lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis
No evidence of SIMD/MIMD architecture experience, GPU workload optimization, or hardware-software co-design
Education and most work history are not aligned with the required qualifications for this principal-level hardware optimization role
